Sample Paper

Abstract
This paper discusses reference verification.

Introduction
The method builds on prior work (Smith, 2023).

References
Smith, J. (2023). Reference verification with AI. Journal of Demo Studies. https://doi.org/10.1234/ABC.Def.2023.
Johnson, A., & Lee, B. (2021). Citation checking methods. Testing Journal. DOI: 10.5678/Test.Case.2021
Brown, C. (2020). A paper without a DOI. Demo Publisher.
